claim: No Stable, release, conformance, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A named site nav uses lists, disclosure buttons, and real anchors without menu, menubar, or menuitem roles.
semantics.current: One matching destination may expose aria-current=page.

interaction.keyboard: Tab follows native order; Escape closes an open group and restores focus to its trigger.
interaction.pointer: Click controls disclosure and optional pointer entry may update a preview.
interaction.touch: Narrow panels remain in flow and all controls meet target size.

enhancementIsolation.previewOmitted: No focus or pointer preview handlers, preview state, aside, name, or renderer call exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Borders, current state, and focus use system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Meaning does not depend on animation.
preferences.rtl: Panels and boundaries use logical placement.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include generated parity, packed consumers, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
The component intentionally does not implement application-menu arrow-key behavior.
